Holiday Notice: Nzotho FET College will be closed from December 13th, 2024 to January 5th, 2025. Staff will return on Monday, January 6th, 2025.

Nzotho FET College in Polokwane

We have so far trained 2500 learners each year on the variety of programs. We train police officers, security officers, private investigators, corporate forensic investigators; internal investigators from all government departments to conduct internal investigations for court and internal hearing purposes. We also train anyone who is interested in our programs including matriculates who want to study in our fields

Our objective is a commitment to the highest quality of education and customer service. Nzotho FET College aims at growing by opening branches in other areas, obtaining more accreditations on other qualifications and programs with different authorities and
increasing the total number of learners we train each yea

Awesome Teachers

A great teacher inspires their students and creates a sense of community and belonging for each student in the classroom.

Global Certificate

A blended learning program to develop global skills essential to live, work, and make a social impact around the world.

Student Support Service

We provide our students with opportunities for academic development and assist students with basic college requirements.

Best Programm

At Nzotho FET College we commit ourselves to helping our students achieve success and reach their fullest potential.
